commands.review_summary:
Adds a write-time expiry sweep, 5,000-entry cap, size getter, colocated DiscordEntityCache eviction tests, and a Discord changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection rather than a live failing run. Current main only expires the exact key being fetched and has no distinct-key sweep or cap, while the PR body shows after-fix runtime output for the bounded behavior.
